name: Ohio Golf Club
about: Ohio Golf Club is an indoor golf destination featuring TrackMan 4 simulators, private hitting bays, expert instruction, and a full-service bar. The facility offers bay rentals, private lessons with PGA-certified professionals, custom club fittings, and memberships. It provides a premium environment for golfers to practice, play virtual courses, receive coaching, and host events. Members benefit from discounted rates, complimentary lessons, and access to a 4,000 sq ft putting green and short game area.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan 4 technology for the most accurate golf simulation
4,000 sq ft putting green and short game area for comprehensive practice
PGA-certified instruction and custom club fitting services
Full-service bar and upscale facility for social events

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB not mentioned; no kitchen or food service indicated
Full-service bar available for events and general use

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-standard technology recognized as the most accurate golf simulator system

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use with the simulators and practice areas.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed, but the facility has a full-service bar available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 1.5-2 hours depending on the course and number of players.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is designed for all ages including juniors and youth golfers.
